title: PictoCraft
description: Official modpack of PictoCraft server. Based on Fabulously Optimized modpack with some additions and default config tweaks
body:
This project is a fork of [Fabulously Optimized modpack by robotkoer](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), please refer to its description for more details on what it offers.

The only purpose of this modpack is to be used by PictoCraft server players. It is designed to be suited for them (direct server connection in Multiplayer tab and settings adapted to player needs and average hardware).

Multiple additional mods are included for convenience and better gameplay experience, such as Xaero's Minimap & World Map for exploration, Distant Horizons (disabled by default) for extended render distance or Litematica for builders.  
We keep adding new mods to the pack when they seem interesting to several players. The changelog always list them with a link to their Modrinth page.
